about_public_record.about_summary_narrative:
Kevin Ree Evers is the Vice President of the Harleton ISD Board of Trustees, serving Place 4. He was appointed (not elected) in February 2024 to fill a vacancy and will face voters for the first time in November 2026.

Evers comes from a multi-generational Harleton family. His mother, Rebecca Chambers Evers, died in December 2024; his father, Billy Ray Evers, died in 2010. His siblings include Nan Evers, Renate Jeffcoat, and Craig Evers.

Correction entered April 27, 2026: a prior version of this profile treated information about Bro. Craig Evers, the Oak Grove Baptist Church preacher, as a Kevin Evers conflict item. Kevin Evers is not Bro. Craig Evers. That negative conflict item has been removed, and RepWatchr does not currently publish any conflict-of-interest finding from that situation.

A TX Secretary of State filing (0067687301) is registered to PO Box 595, Harleton, TX, in connection with Evers. The entity details require further research.

No negative criminal record items have surfaced in open-source review as of this research date.

summary: Kevin Ree Evers is the Vice President of Harleton ISD (Place 4). APPOINTED February 2024, not elected. Has never faced voters. Multi-generational Harleton family. Corrected April 27, 2026: a prior conflict note tied to Bro. Craig Evers has been removed. TX SOS filing 0067687301 registered to PO Box 595, Harleton. Clean criminal record in open-source review. On the November 2026 ballot.
analyst_notes: Correction entered April 27, 2026: Kevin Evers is not Bro. Craig Evers, the Oak Grove Baptist Church preacher. The prior family-employment conflict note has been removed from Kevin Evers's red flags, conflict inventory, and score inputs. Keep future scoring tied only to source-backed records directly connected to Kevin Evers. The appointment (not election) path to the board remains notable: voters have never had a say on this trustee. November 2026 will be his first electoral test. Priority next moves: identify the TX SOS entity, locate social media, pull Harrison CAD property records, and confirm current occupation and employer.
